ground_truth.title: 10 Best Moving Companies in New York (2025 Reviews)
ground_truth.author: Ryan Carrigan
ground_truth.main_content:
10 Best Moving Companies in New York (2025 Reviews)

Hi, I'm Ryan. Let's get moving. I've helped thousands of people move over the last decade, and I can tell you that no two moves are exactly alike. Let me help you find the mover that's right for you.

Best local NY mover:

Our track record
Each year, 400,000+ people trust our moving recommendations. Here are a few reasons why:
- Founded in 2015

- $50,000 in moving grants delivered
- Up-to-date pricing info & industry data

Best movers for those moving locally in New York
Whether you're moving across town in New York City, Brooklyn, or elsewhere in New York - or within 50 miles down the road - hiring a local NY mover is likely your best bet.
We've evaluated 133 local New York movers and recommend Zip to Zip Moving Inc thanks to their professionalism and clear rates.

1. Zip to Zip Moving Inc: 4.58 out of 5 stars
2. Lifestyle Moving & Storage: 4.12 out of 5 stars
3. Men On The Move: 4.76 out of 5 stars
4. Seka Moving: 4.7 out of 5 stars
5. Piece of Cake Moving & Storage: 4.66 out of 5 stars

Zip to Zip Moving Inc
Address: 218 Withers St Apt. 1A, Brooklyn, NY 11211
Rating: 4.58/5
98% of all reviews were positive
1% of reviews were negative
Review Analysis: Fast moves, friendly faces-Zip to Zip Moving Inc receives high marks from 722 customer reviews, with over 98% positive input. Most feedback highlights efficient service, polite and professional staff, careful handling of property, a quick moving process, and helpful movers. Many users describe the staff as respectful and attentive, while pointing to smooth, fast, and damage-free moves as standout qualities. A handful of reviews mention issues such as significantly higher-than-expected final costs, property damage, and slow or insufficient responses to complaints. Compared to other moving services, Zip to Zip stands out for speed and courtesy, but potential clients should discuss all pricing details and coverage for damages upfront. For most, the experience is seamless and stress-free; only a few customers report major concerns.

Lifestyle Moving & Storage
Address: 99 Hudson St, 5th Floor #7148, New York, NY 10013
Rating: 4.12/5
97% of all reviews were positive
2% of reviews were negative
Review Analysis: This moving company stands out with consistently high marks: 97% of the 376 feedback entries are positive. Customers frequently mention that the team operates with impressive efficiency, professionalism, and politeness. Movers handle items carefully, complete moves quickly, and keep clients informed at each step. Communication, from booking through the final check-in, is often cited as one of the best customers have experienced. By contrast, a small percentage of input highlights damage to property or belongings, occasional rushed jobs, and rare lapses in communication. Some reviewers mention unresolved claims or dissatisfied complaint handling, particularly for moves involving damages. Compared to many moving companies in the region, Lifestyle Moving & Storage draws praise for reliability, cost-effectiveness, and standout customer service. Most customer input agrees: their streamlined, attentive approach makes moving less stressful than competitors.

Men On The Move
Address: 150 Crossways Park Drive West, Woodbury, NY 11797
Rating: 4.76/5
85% of all reviews were positive
12% of reviews were negative
Review Analysis: Customers rave about Men On The Move for being efficient, professional, and polite. Most feedback highlights their careful handling of belongings, quick process, and competitive rates. Many describe a stress-free experience with friendly, respectful staff and transparent communication. Issues that do arise are usually resolved quickly, setting them apart from many moving companies. Some customers report problems with damaged items, unexpected or higher-than-estimated charges, and a few mention rude staff interactions. These complaints, though less common, show that while Men On The Move consistently delivers top service for most, a small number have faced notable setbacks. With 682 reviews analyzed-85% positive-Men On The Move stands out with more reliable service, better staff, and smoother moves compared to other movers in the area.

Men On The Move, serving Woodbury, NY since 1988, specializes in local residential moving services and has cultivated a reputation for reliability and professionalism. They also offer packing, unpacking, and crating services, ensuring a comprehensive moving experience. Highly regarded by customers, Men On The Move boasts an impressive 4.0 average rating from 228 Yelp reviews and a near-perfect 4.9 rating from 68 Google reviews, complemented by an A+ rating from the Better Business Bureau. Unlike many nearby competitors, they also provide full valuation insurance coverage, offering additional peace of mind to those entrusting them with valuable items like pianos, art, and antiques.

Seka Moving
Address: 48 Wall St #1100, New York, NY 10005
Rating: 4.7/5
85% of all reviews were positive
13% of reviews were negative
Review Analysis: Seka Moving earns top marks from customers who praise efficient service, careful handling of belongings, professional and polite staff, speed, and clear communication. In 495 reviews, 85% are positive, suggesting that most find the company reliable and courteous. Feedback consistently highlights movers' attention to protecting property and working swiftly, even with challenging jobs or tight schedules. Customers appreciate that estimates and pricing tend to be accurate. Negative input accounts for 13%, where the main complaints center on damaged items, delayed arrival or delivery, and unexpected charges after the move. These issues can be especially frustrating during long-distance relocations, where delivery windows or extra fees sometimes catch people off guard. Neutral reviews typically note reasonable moves but cite problems like slow packing or unclear fee explanations. Compared to many movers, Seka stands out for its organization, efficiency, and respectful treatment of customers' property, but like others in this industry, a few operational or scheduling missteps sometimes occur. The company's strength lies in its fast, attentive, and careful crews, making it a leading choice among moving services, especially for local moves.

Seka Moving has been providing local residential moving services in and around New York, NY since 2019 and has quickly built a reputable name in the industry. With impressive consumer reviews-an average rating of 4.6 on Yelp and 4.9 on Google My Business, coupled with an A+ Better Business Bureau rating-Seka Moving stands out among nearby competitors. Their comprehensive offerings include packing and unpacking services, labor-only services, and specialized moving for items such as pianos, hot tubs, and art. Though a deposit is required, they accept multiple payment forms and provide full valuation insurance coverage, making them a trustworthy choice for local moves.

Piece of Cake Moving & Storage
Address: 287 Park Avenue South, New York, NY 10010 US
Rating: 4.66/5
95% of all reviews were positive
5% of reviews were negative
Review Analysis: Piece of Cake Moving & Storage makes relocating feel like a breeze for most customers, with 94.5% of nearly 9,000 reviews giving positive feedback. Their crews often win praise for being efficient, friendly, and showing care with belongings, making moves run quickly and protecting furniture well. Many also mention good communication and stress-free experiences, even for moves under tough conditions. Some reviewers highlight organized packing and transparent pricing as standout qualities that set Piece of Cake above their competition in major cities. Still, a small but notable group (5%) describe frustrating experiences such as item damage, surprise charges not made clear upfront, or missing boxes-and a handful share stories of items lost or mishandled during long-distance moves. A few neutral reviews point out that while customer support is responsive, the packing service can fall short of expectations. Compared to similar companies, Piece of Cake is recognized for consistent service, but it's important for customers to ensure item lists are accurate and to monitor the moving process. For those seeking a smooth, hands-off move with careful, reliable movers, Piece of Cake comes highly recommended, but vigilance is wise to prevent issues common in the industry.

Piece of Cake Moving & Storage offers top-tier local residential moving services in and around New York, NY, setting itself apart from competitors with its reliability and efficiency. Since 2019, this company has garnered a stellar reputation, boasting an impressive 4.7 average rating on Yelp from 1,580 reviews and a 4.8 average rating on Google from 3,214 reviews. They also hold a BBB rating of A-, underscoring their commitment to customer satisfaction. In addition to local moves, their comprehensive services include packing, unpacking, and specialty moves for pianos, art, and antiques. Customers appreciate that they accept credit cards, although a deposit is required.
